hero.search_placeholder: Search for help articles, guides, or FAQs...

channels.title: Email Support
channels.description: Get help from our support team

questions.question: How do I get started with MoltenArc?
questions.answer: Getting started is easy! Simply create an account, verify your email, connect your Solana or Arbitrum wallet, and you're ready to send secure messages.

questions.question: Is my data really secure on the blockchain?
questions.answer: Yes! All messages are end-to-end encrypted and verified on the blockchain. Your data is never stored in plain text, and only you and your recipient can decrypt the messages.

questions.question: Which blockchains does MoltenArc support?
questions.answer: Currently, we support Solana and Arbitrum networks. We're constantly evaluating new blockchain networks to expand our supported platforms.

questions.question: Can I use MoltenArc without a crypto wallet?
questions.answer: While blockchain verification requires a wallet, you can still use basic messaging features with just an email account. However, for full security benefits, we recommend connecting a wallet.

questions.question: What's the difference between free and paid plans?
questions.answer: Free plans include basic messaging with monthly limits, while paid plans offer unlimited messages, advanced features, priority support, and custom domains.

emergency_support.title: Emergency Support
emergency_support.description: If you're experiencing a security issue or urgent problem that requires immediate attention, please contact our emergency support line.
